patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 1 validated 6+ times — market negative edge reliably outperforms even triple F-signal stacks (MIL@CHC 05-18, F1+F2+F3 lost 9-3). Never relax regardless of F-signal conviction.
HARD CAP 7 (pick-side bullpen disadvantage) fires today for the first time on HOU@MIN (gap=+0.0014). Backtest 0-for-7 on this bucket (p=0.78%); even tiny positive gap correctly caps the pick.
4-condition OVERRIDE rule is 4-for-4 in archive; today CHW@SEA (f5_full_delta=0.0362) and SF@ARI (no stacked flags, fair_prob missing) both fail at least two conditions — no OVERRIDE issued.
F3-alone without F1/F2 backup cannot overcome simultaneous SP-edge-against and large PQI headwind — repeatedly validated (NYM@WSH 05-18: F3=2908, WSH lost 16-7). Affects CHW@SEA and PIT@STL today.
D-grade SKIP picks with BOTH SP-edge AND PQI against model direction are directionally unreliable (confirmed 05-18: OAK@LAA, LAD@SD). Applies to SF@ARI, TEX@COL, PIT@STL, OAK@LAA today.

CIN @ PHI.reasoning: Grade C (score=0). fair_prob missing — Odds API did not fire — correctly caps at C and zeros stake per market-validation requirement. PQI mildly confirms PHI (Δ=+6.7), Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.05). No hard caps otherwise fired. PHI direction at 50.26% full_prob is near coin-flip; without a market anchor, no confirmed edge basis exists. CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: fair_prob missing caps at C — market validation required before staking
No hard caps fired; C-grade default SKIP is process-correct

BAL @ TB.reasoning: Grade D (score=-1). f5_full_delta=0.2128: BAL's SP dominates F5 at 73.5% but TB expected to win full game at 52.2% — bullpen-carry thesis required. Stage 1/2 disagree (-1). No F-signals. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.004 (TB HL bullpen marginally better) does not offset the D-grade structural concerns. odds_status=fetched_capped limits market validation. CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: f5_full_delta=0.2128 exceeds 0.15 Heuristic 5 threshold — bullpen-carry dependent
D-grade no-F-signal SKIP is the correct posture

HOU @ MIN.reasoning: Pre-cap grade A (score=5): F1*=1.27 backed by PQI (Δ=+11.1) meets HARD CAP 5, SP edge 0.81 xERA agrees with MIN, Stage 1/2 tight (Δ=0.03). [HARD CAP 7] fires: hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0014 ≥ 0 on elevated pick → score 5→1 (0-for-7 backtest, p=0.78%). fair_prob also missing → capped at C. Direction likely valid; both caps correctly zero the stake.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 7: pick-side bullpen disadvantage on elevated pick — 0-for-7 historical (inaugural live firing today)
HARD CAP 5: F1* backed by PQI confirms satisfies secondary-signal requirement
fair_prob missing caps at C — market validation required

TEX @ COL.reasoning: Grade D (score=-2). SP edge 0.79 xERA AGAINST COL (TEX SP better), PQI AGAINST (Δ=-10.1) — both primary signals oppose the COL pick. No F-signals. confidence_downgrade=False; no stress flags. Coors park inflation may partially offset headwinds, but the D-grade with no supporting signals is correct. Per 05-18 pattern: D-grade picks with both SP-edge and PQI against are directionally unreliable. CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: D-grade with SP-edge + PQI both against = directionally unreliable (05-18 validated)
No F-signals on a D-grade SKIP confirms non-staking posture

Two conditions fail. CONFIRM SKIP.
